title: Trigonometry
summary: 9709 P3 trigonometry — radians, identities, equations, and inverse functions with GeoGebra unit circle.
learningObjectives: Use radian measure in all P3 trig.
Apply advanced identities and solve equations.
Work with inverse trig functions and their domains.
Prove identities using compound angle formulae.

simpleExplanation.title: P3 trig in radians
simpleExplanation.summary: P3 extends P2 with inverse functions, general solutions, and tighter links to calculus.
steps: All angles in radians unless stated.
arcsin, arccos, arctan — restricted domains for inverses.
General solution: add 2nπ to principal value.
Differentiate sin x, cos x with x in radians.

sections.content: **P3 Trigonometry** (3.3) assumes **P2** (2.3) fluency. Inverse trig domain/range errors are very common — state them explicitly.
